Metadata.title: Nestio - Smart Gadgets for Your Home
Metadata.description: Discover smart gadgets for your home and kitchen. Free shipping on orders over €30.

Hero.label: Curated for Modern Living
Hero.title: Elevate Your Everyday
Hero.subtitle: Thoughtfully selected gadgets that bring elegance and efficiency to every corner of your home.

silicone-food-storage-bags.name: Reusable Silicone Food Storage Bags
silicone-food-storage-bags.shortDescription: Ditch the plastic — these airtight silicone bags keep food fresh and the planet happy
silicone-food-storage-bags.description: Make the switch from single-use plastic to these durable, reusable silicone food storage bags. Featuring a leak-proof seal that locks in freshness, they're perfect for storing leftovers, marinating meat, packing lunches, or freezing fruits and vegetables. Microwave and dishwasher safe for ultimate convenience. Each set includes 4 bags in different sizes.
features: Set of 4 bags in different sizes

portable-blender.name: Portable USB Blender
portable-blender.shortDescription: Blend smoothies, shakes, and juices anywhere — just charge via USB and go
portable-blender.description: Fresh smoothies aren't just for the kitchen anymore. This powerful portable blender lets you blend your favorite drinks wherever you are — at the gym, in the office, or on a hike. With sharp stainless steel blades and a rechargeable USB battery that lasts up to 15 blends per charge, you'll never settle for a store-bought smoothie again. Just add ingredients, press the button, and enjoy in 30 seconds.
features: USB-C rechargeable — up to 15 blends per charge
6 stainless steel blades for smooth results

sunset-lamp.name: Sunset Projection Lamp
sunset-lamp.shortDescription: Transform any room with a warm, golden sunset glow — perfect for photos and ambiance
sunset-lamp.description: Bring the magic of golden hour indoors with this stunning sunset projection lamp. It casts a beautiful warm gradient of light onto your walls and ceiling, creating an instantly cozy and aesthetic atmosphere. Ideal for setting the mood, taking stunning photos for social media, or simply unwinding after a long day. Features 180° adjustable head and multiple color options.
features: Multiple color modes including warm sunset and rainbow
USB powered — works with any USB port or power bank
LED technology — cool to touch and energy efficient

digital-meat-thermometer.name: Digital Meat Thermometer
digital-meat-thermometer.shortDescription: Instant-read precision for perfectly cooked meat every time — no more guessing
digital-meat-thermometer.description: Take the guesswork out of cooking with this ultra-fast digital meat thermometer. Get accurate temperature readings in just 2-3 seconds with a wide range of -50°C to 300°C. The foldable probe design makes it compact for storage, and the large backlit LCD display is easy to read even in low light. Perfect for grilling, roasting, frying, and BBQ.

electric-milk-frother.name: Electric Milk Frother
electric-milk-frother.shortDescription: Create barista-quality frothy milk at home in seconds — for lattes, cappuccinos, and more
electric-milk-frother.description: Upgrade your morning coffee routine with this handheld electric milk frother. With a powerful motor and stainless steel whisk, it creates rich, creamy froth in seconds. Works with all types of milk including oat, almond, and coconut. USB rechargeable and dishwasher-safe whisk for easy cleaning. Compact enough to take anywhere.
features: Powerful motor creates froth in 15 seconds
USB rechargeable — lasts 60+ uses per charge

vegetable-spiralizer.name: Vegetable Spiralizer
vegetable-spiralizer.shortDescription: Turn any vegetable into healthy noodles in seconds — perfect for low-carb meals
vegetable-spiralizer.description: Make healthy eating fun and easy with this handheld vegetable spiralizer. Create beautiful zucchini noodles, carrot ribbons, cucumber spirals, and more in seconds. No electricity needed — just twist and go. Comes with 3 interchangeable blades for different spiral thicknesses. A must-have for anyone following a low-carb, keto, or plant-based diet.
features: Works with zucchini, carrots, cucumbers, and more
No electricity needed — manual twist design

handheld-vacuum-sealer.name: Handheld Vacuum Sealer
handheld-vacuum-sealer.shortDescription: Keep food fresh 5x longer with this wireless mini vacuum sealer — no bags needed
handheld-vacuum-sealer.description: Say goodbye to food waste with this compact handheld vacuum sealer. It removes air from bags and containers in seconds, keeping food fresh up to 5 times longer than traditional storage. The wireless, USB-rechargeable design means you can use it anywhere. Works with standard ziplock bags and special vacuum containers. Perfect for meal prep, sous vide cooking, and leftovers.
features: Works with ziplock bags and vacuum containers
Compact and portable — fits in a drawer

rain-cloud-diffuser.name: Rain Cloud Aroma Diffuser
rain-cloud-diffuser.shortDescription: A mesmerizing rain cloud that fills your room with calming mist and essential oil aromas
rain-cloud-diffuser.description: Experience the soothing sight and sound of rain right on your nightstand. This unique diffuser creates a beautiful water-drip effect that mimics rainfall while dispersing your favorite essential oils throughout the room. Features 7 color-changing LED lights and whisper-quiet operation. The perfect combination of aromatherapy and ambient decor for relaxation, meditation, or sleep.

crystal-touch-lamp.name: Crystal Touch Lamp
crystal-touch-lamp.shortDescription: Elegant diamond-cut crystal lamp with touch dimming — instant luxury for any room
crystal-touch-lamp.description: Add a touch of elegance to your space with this stunning crystal table lamp. The diamond-cut design refracts light into beautiful patterns on your walls and ceiling. Features 3 brightness levels controlled by a simple touch on top. USB rechargeable and cordless for placement anywhere. The warm golden glow creates the perfect ambient atmosphere for bedrooms, living rooms, or dining areas.
features: Diamond-cut crystal body with light refraction
Warm white LED — 8 hours battery life

floating-wall-shelves.name: Floating Wall Shelves Set
floating-wall-shelves.shortDescription: Invisible mount shelves that look like they're floating — clean, modern, and minimalist
floating-wall-shelves.description: Transform your walls with these sleek floating shelves. The hidden bracket design creates the illusion of shelves floating on the wall, perfect for displaying plants, books, candles, or decor. Made from solid wood with a smooth matte finish. Set includes 3 shelves in different sizes. Easy to install with included hardware and template.
features: Set of 3 shelves in different sizes
Solid wood with smooth matte finish

moon-lamp-3d.name: 3D Moon Lamp
moon-lamp-3d.shortDescription: A realistic 3D-printed moon that glows with warm light — the perfect bedside companion
moon-lamp-3d.description: Bring the moon into your room with this stunning 3D-printed moon lamp. Created using actual NASA moon surface data, every crater and detail is faithfully reproduced. Features touch control with 2 color modes (warm white and warm yellow) and adjustable brightness. Comes with a wooden stand and USB charging cable. A beautiful gift for space lovers and anyone who appreciates unique decor.
features: 3D printed using NASA lunar surface data

galaxy-star-projector.name: Galaxy Star Projector
galaxy-star-projector.shortDescription: Turn your ceiling into a galaxy of stars and nebula clouds — mesmerizing night light
galaxy-star-projector.description: Transform any room into a cosmic experience with this galaxy star projector. Projects a stunning display of stars, nebula clouds, and aurora effects onto your walls and ceiling. Features multiple color combinations, adjustable brightness, and a built-in timer. Control it via the included remote or pair it with the app for smart home integration. Perfect for bedrooms, home theaters, parties, or helping kids fall asleep.
features: Multiple color combinations and brightness levels

mini-portable-projector.name: Mini Portable Projector
mini-portable-projector.shortDescription: Cinema-quality projection from your pocket — connect any device and watch anywhere
mini-portable-projector.description: Turn any wall into a movie screen with this ultra-compact portable projector. Despite its small size, it delivers a bright, clear image up to 120 inches. Connect via HDMI, USB, or wirelessly via WiFi to stream from your phone, laptop, or gaming console. Built-in speakers deliver decent audio, and the rechargeable battery gives you 2 hours of wireless viewing. Perfect for movie nights, gaming, presentations, or outdoor cinema.

wireless-charging-pad.name: Wireless Charging Pad
wireless-charging-pad.shortDescription: Elegant wood-finish wireless charger — just place your phone and charge effortlessly
wireless-charging-pad.description: Charge your phone the elegant way with this premium wireless charging pad. The natural wood grain finish blends beautifully into any desk, nightstand, or living room setup. Supports all Qi-enabled devices with fast charging up to 15W. Features anti-slip silicone surface, LED indicator, and over-charge protection. Simply place your phone down and pick it up fully charged.

smart-wifi-plug.name: Smart WiFi Plug (2-Pack)
smart-wifi-plug.shortDescription: Control any device from your phone — turn on lights, coffee makers, and more remotely
smart-wifi-plug.description: Make any device smart with these WiFi-enabled smart plugs. Control your lamps, coffee maker, fan, or any appliance from your phone — anywhere in the world. Set schedules and timers so devices turn on and off automatically. Works with voice assistants and doesn't require a hub. The compact design doesn't block adjacent outlets. Set of 2 plugs included.
features: No hub required — connects directly to WiFi
Compact design — doesn't block other outlets

volcanic-flame-diffuser.name: Volcanic Flame Aroma Diffuser
volcanic-flame-diffuser.shortDescription: A mesmerizing flame effect diffuser that doubles as a mood lamp — USB powered, essential oil ready
volcanic-flame-diffuser.description: Bring the ambiance of a volcanic flame to your desk or nightstand with this unique aroma diffuser. The realistic flame effect creates a warm, cozy atmosphere while dispersing your favorite essential oils throughout the room. USB powered and ultra-portable, it works anywhere — no candles, no fire, no mess. The 130ml water tank provides hours of continuous misting.
features: USB powered — works with any power source

neon-led-lamp.name: 3D Neon LED Lamp
neon-led-lamp.shortDescription: Eye-catching acrylic LED lamp with 3D neon effect — perfect bedroom or desk decor
neon-led-lamp.description: Add a pop of personality to any room with this stunning 3D neon LED lamp. The acrylic panel creates a beautiful neon sign effect with vibrant colors that stand out in any setting. USB powered and energy efficient, it makes the perfect nightlight, desk accent, or Instagram-worthy room decor. Available in multiple designs to match your style.
features: 3D acrylic panel with neon glow effect
Perfect for bedrooms, desks, and shelves

phone-tablet-stand.name: 360° Phone & Tablet Stand
phone-tablet-stand.shortDescription: Adjustable metal stand for phones and tablets — perfect for desks, kitchens, and nightstands
phone-tablet-stand.description: The ultimate hands-free solution for your phone or tablet. This premium metal stand features a 360° rotating head and adjustable height, so you can find the perfect viewing angle for video calls, recipe reading, streaming, or working. The weighted base keeps everything stable, while the non-slip silicone pads protect your device. Works with all phones and tablets up to 12.9 inches.
features: Premium metal construction — heavy and stable
Non-slip silicone pads protect your device
Compatible with all phones and tablets up to 12.9"

posture-corrector.name: Smart Posture Corrector
posture-corrector.shortDescription: Intelligent posture training belt with real-time vibration alerts — improve your posture effortlessly
posture-corrector.description: Fix your posture without thinking about it. This smart posture corrector uses built-in sensors to detect when you're slouching and sends a gentle vibration reminder to straighten up. Unlike traditional braces, it trains your muscles to maintain good posture naturally over time. Adjustable straps fit all body types, and the slim design is invisible under clothing. USB rechargeable with a battery that lasts all day.

travel-electronics-organizer.name: Travel Electronics Organizer
travel-electronics-organizer.shortDescription: Keep all your cables, chargers, and gadgets perfectly organized in one waterproof bag
travel-electronics-organizer.description: Never dig through a tangled mess of cables again. This waterproof electronics organizer has dedicated pockets and elastic loops for every gadget you carry — chargers, cables, earbuds, power banks, USB drives, and more. The double-layer design maximizes space while keeping everything visible and accessible. Perfect for travel, commuting, or just keeping your desk drawer tidy.
features: Fits chargers, cables, power banks, and more
Compact enough for any bag or backpack

Trust.guaranteeDesc: Not happy? Full refund, no questions asked
Trust.securePaymentsDesc: Your data is protected with SSL encryption
Trust.fastDeliveryDesc: Delivered to your door in 2-5 business days

Checkout.contactOrder: Questions about your order? Contact us.

About.title: About Nestio
About.description: We find the smartest home gadgets so you don't have to.
About.storyText: Nestio was born from a simple idea: everyday life at home can be better with the right tools. We scour the globe for clever, well-designed gadgets that solve real problems — from kitchen messes to cozy ambiance. Every product in our catalog has been personally tested and approved before it reaches your door.
About.missionText: To make every home smarter, one gadget at a time. We believe great design shouldn't cost a fortune, and practical solutions should be accessible to everyone.
About.whyUsText: We're not just another online store. We handpick every product, offer honest descriptions, and stand behind everything we sell with a 30-day money-back guarantee. Plus, with free shipping over €30 and fast delivery across Greece and Cyprus, shopping with us is effortless.

review1.text: The sunset lamp completely transformed my living room. The warm glow creates the perfect atmosphere for relaxation. Shipping to Athens was surprisingly fast!
review1.name: Maria K.

review2.text: I ordered the volcanic flame diffuser and it's absolutely stunning. The flame effect looks so real! Everyone who visits asks about it. Amazing quality for the price.
review2.name: Dimitris P.

review3.text: The galaxy projector is my daughter's favourite thing ever. She falls asleep watching stars every night. Wonderful product and beautiful packaging.
review3.name: Elena S.

review4.text: The travel electronics organizer is a game changer. All my cables and chargers finally have a home. My desk has never been this clean!
review4.name: Nikos A.

Newsletter.title: New Arrivals & Offers
Newsletter.description: Be the first to discover new products and exclusive deals. We send one email per week — no spam, ever.
Newsletter.success: Thank you! You're now on the list.
Newsletter.privacy: We respect your privacy. Unsubscribe anytime.

WhyNestio.label: Why Choose Us
WhyNestio.title: Designed for the Way You Live
WhyNestio.description: We believe your home should be both beautiful and functional. Every product we offer is handpicked to bring joy and simplicity to your daily routine.

curated.title: Carefully Curated
curated.description: Every product is tested and selected by our team. We only sell what we'd use in our own homes.

quality.title: Quality Materials
quality.description: Durable, well-crafted products made with materials that last. No cheap knock-offs, ever.

care.title: We Truly Care
care.description: From fast shipping across Greece & Cyprus to our 30-day guarantee — your satisfaction is everything.

Contact.label: Contact
Contact.title: Get in Touch
Contact.description: Have a question or need help with your order? We're here for you.

form.name: Name
form.subject: Subject
form.success: Thank you! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

Returns.title: Returns & Refunds
Returns.description: We want you to love your purchase. If you're not satisfied, we'll make it right.
policy: You have 30 days from delivery to request a return
Items must be unused and in their original packaging
Contact us via email to initiate a return — we'll provide a shipping label
Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after we receive the item
Shipping costs for returns are covered by the customer unless the item is defective
Defective or wrong items are replaced at no extra cost

Terms.title: Terms & Conditions
Terms.description: Please read these terms carefully before using our website or placing an order.

sections.title: General
sections.content: By accessing and using the Nestio website, you agree to be bound by these terms and conditions. We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time.

sections.title: Orders & Pricing
sections.content: All prices are listed in Euros (€) and include VAT. We reserve the right to change prices without prior notice. An order is confirmed only after you receive a confirmation email.

sections.title: Shipping & Delivery
sections.content: We ship to Greece and Cyprus. Standard delivery takes 2-5 business days. Free shipping is available on orders over €30. Orders under €30 are charged a flat €3.50 shipping fee.

sections.title: Payment
sections.content: We accept major credit and debit cards. All payments are processed securely through our payment provider. Your card information is never stored on our servers.

sections.title: Liability
sections.content: Nestio is not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our products. Product images are for illustration purposes and may vary slightly from the actual item.

Footer.aboutText: Nestio brings you the smartest home and kitchen gadgets. Handpicked, tested, and delivered to your door.
